issues.detail: The skill does not address error handling or edge cases, limiting robustness.

scenarios.name: B2B SaaS scaling from 80 paying users
scenarios.rationale: Treatment picks one primary platform, applies the three content levels (educate/inspire/entertain) with 5 ideas each, owned-email lead magnet, and defers paid ads until ~300+ users; baseline scatters paid and organic from day one without the framework.

scenarios.name: Local service business with no budget
scenarios.rationale: Treatment picks Instagram + Google Business Profile as a single channel, supplies content across all three levels, collects email at booking, and explicitly defers paid ads; baseline recommends paid first and multi-channel scatter, violating the spend-time-not-money principle.
